_comment: Explicit, auditable waivers for performance-budget regressions (bd-session-history-remediation-ocv9i.16.7). The CI/release benchmark gate (scripts/check_benchmark_budgets.py) fails on any budget regression UNLESS a matching active waiver is recorded here with a rationale and owning bead. A waiver demotes a failing benchmark from FAIL to WAIVED (a warning), it never silences a passing one. Keep this list empty in steady state; every entry is a tracked debt.

_schema.benchmark: budget key or prefix it applies to, e.g. 'remediation/incident_append' or 'remediation/'
_schema.rationale: why the regression is temporarily acceptable (required, non-empty)
_schema.bead_id: owning bead that will remove the waiver (required, 'bd-' prefixed)
_schema.expires: YYYY-MM-DD after which the waiver is inactive and the budget re-gates (required)
